2347620.name: Spark Defense Demo
2347620.description:
Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled adventure with the demo of Spark Defense! This MOBA meets tower defense game with hero-driven gameplay will keep you on the edge of your seat. With the demo, you can choose from two heroes, Frosteya, the archer, or Turn'Up, the close combat specialist, and try to survive all four waves of action-packed gameplay.

Tailor your defensive strategy to your chosen hero and build out your bunker to defend the Harvester. Will you choose to play defense or fight alongside your turrets to take down the enemy? The choice is yours, but be sure to upgrade your towers and walls to survive the final waves!

With the demo, you can experience the ultimate MOBA defense game for yourself. Keep the Harvester functional to receive those all-important upgrades and try to outsmart your enemies with your strategic prowess. Don't miss out on this intense adventure of strategy and skill – download the Spark Defense demo now!
2347620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
